summary: Complete testing of Melus AI HomePage and WorkspacePage features. Fixed critical bug: FastAPI route ordering issue causing /workspace/recent and /workspace/deployed to return 404. All requested features verified working: suggestion buttons fill textarea, 'Crear App' navigates to /workspace with prompt, WorkspacePage initiates agent generation.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in table - related to Emergent visual editor wrapper, does not affect functionality

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: FastAPI route ordering bug - /workspace/recent and /workspace/deployed were defined AFTER /{workspace_id}, causing FastAPI to match 'recent' and 'deployed' as workspace_id parameters
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Moved static routes (/list, /recent, /deployed) BEFORE parameterized route (/{workspace_id})

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing user account
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) HomePage suggestion buttons ('Tienda online', 'Landing page', 'Dashboard', 'Blog', 'Portfolio') correctly fill the textarea with predefined prompts, 2) 'Crear App' button navigates to /workspace?prompt={encoded_text}, 3) WorkspacePage receives prompt from URL and starts agent generation showing logs, 4) /workspace/recent and /workspace/deployed endpoints now work correctly after route ordering fix.

features_tested.homepage_suggestion_buttons: PASS - All 5 suggestion buttons ('store', 'landing', 'dashboard', 'blog', 'portfolio') visible and fill textarea with correct prompts
features_tested.workspace_page_navigation: PASS - WorkspacePage loads with prompt from URL and initiates agent generation
features_tested.workspace_agent_logs: PASS - Shows agent processing logs (classify, architect, etc.)
features_tested.agents_v2_generate_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/agents/v2/generate creates workspace and generates files

api_verification_summary./api/auth/login: 200 OK - Login works with provided credentials
api_verification_summary./api/workspace/recent: 200 OK - Returns recent workspaces (was 404 before fix)
api_verification_summary./api/workspace/deployed: 200 OK - Returns deployed apps (was 404 before fix)
api_verification_summary./api/agents/v2/generate: 200 OK - Creates workspace and generates app files
api_verification_summary./api/agents/v2/agents: 200 OK - Returns list of all agents
